evals.prompt: 给 extractor/extract.py 里面每一个函数都写一个独立可运行的样例文件，帮我快速理解每个函数是干什么的
evals.expected_output: examples/extract/ 目录下为 extract.py 中的每个函数生成一个 .py 文件，每个文件包含样例输入和可直接运行的调用

evals.prompt: Help me understand what each function in extractor/text_utils.py does by creating runnable example files for every function
evals.expected_output: examples/text_utils/ directory with one .py file per function (strip_images, strip_urls, strip_references, strip_acknowledgments, strip_extra_blanks, _split_sections, _classify_headings_with_llm, extract_relevant_sections, preprocess_md), each independently runnable

evals.prompt: 给 extractor/token_tracker.py 的 TokenTracker 类里每个方法写可运行样例
evals.expected_output: examples/token_tracker/ directory with files like TokenTracker___init__.py, TokenTracker_add.py, TokenTracker__aggregate.py, TokenTracker_get_summary.py, TokenTracker_print_summary.py, TokenTracker_save_report.py, TokenTracker_merge.py — each showing realistic usage of that method
